3319960.name: One Tap Roulette
3319960.description:
Take part in the ultimate test of luck and survival with One Tap Roulette, the Russian roulette game where every shot counts - for real.

Challenge your colleagues by inviting them on Steam, or face off daring strangers in intense duels.

The rules? Simple but ruthless: one bullet, one chance, one survivor. Finish each duel to collect points, climb the leaderboard and claim your place at the top. But beware: one defeat and you're out - for good.

With only one life per competitor, the stakes couldn't be higher, and every blow could be your last.

Think you've got what it takes? Take up the challenge and show PRT Ltd. what you're made of!

Will you try your luck?
3319960.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
